input: I want to build a 1-bit LLM for Swahili. Walk me through the pipeline from scratch.
rubric: Names fetch-corpus as the first step (finding public-domain Swahili text)
Mentions enrich-corpus with Wikipedia facts as an optional second step
Describes train-lm with GPT architecture and resume-training pattern
Mentions deploy-checkpoint as the final step with bit-packed output

input: What's the difference between a regular checkpoint and a deployed one?
rubric: Explains that regular checkpoints store fp32 master weights
Explains that deployed checkpoints store bit-packed ternary bytes (~1.6 bits/weight)
Mentions GPT.save_deployed() and GPT.load_deployed() as the API
Notes that deployed models run inference-only with no fp32 masters
